## ✅ Checklist

- [ ] My code builds without errors (`npm run build`)
- [ ] I tested my changes locally (`npm run dev`)
- [ ] I followed the code style (TypeScript, no `any` types)
- [ ] I did NOT add any paid API dependencies
- [ ] I updated the README if needed
- [ ] I updated CHANGELOG.md if this is a notable change
